query: Emit the JSON for a Slack node. I haven't created the Slack credential in n8n yet.
expected_behavior: OMITS the credentials block entirely rather than emitting a placeholder id
Explains a placeholder id like {"id":"REPLACE_ME"} permanently disables the credential selector in the UI
Uses a UUID v4 for the node id, not a human-readable id
Notes the user selects the credential in the UI after import
